text:
saw in the papers that stock markets all over the world were shaken. It is bear grip due to
London bombings.
First this entire situation is only temporary. People will forget as time passes like the
Madrid bombings. That will happen with in next 15 days.
The global financial and stock markets are bound for recovery.
Month of august 2005 can be dull.
Sep 2005 will be much better.
As predicted earlier dollar will be stronger against the euro.
 Future of the Indian media .
With out going in details following are the predictions for Indian cinema.
Indian cinema and media will be in growth phase in the coming years lasting for another
two years.
More of radio channels, TV channels and cinema multiplexes will be launched.

The NRI market and out side country market will grow in revenues more than 100%
Just like holly wood Indian bollywood, kollywood will be respected and welcomed in
many countries.
Indian production will become world class in the coming years.
